item.text: {"outcome":"fail","confidence":"Firm","findings":[{"check":"A-SEC-6","title":"Reset token digest uses non-constant-time equality comparison","severity":"High","path":"src/reset.js","line":20,"quote":"return record.digest === suppliedDigest;"}],"reasoning":"bcrypt cost 12 is used for password hashing and bcrypt.compare verifies passwords. Reset tokens use randomBytes(32), and the rate limiter is registered before the reset route. However, reset token digests are compared with === rather than a constant-time comparison, so A-SEC-6 fails."}
